headline: ITA Investors: Watch These Two Events Over the Next 30 Days
summary: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) is sitting on a 34% one-year gain heading into June, with shares at roughly $235 and $13.5 billion in net assets. Two events in the next four weeks will largely decide whether ITA keeps running: the Pentagon’s FY2027 budget moving through Congress, and the June 29 Honeywell ... headline: GENERAL ELECTRIC (NYSE:GE) Earns High Technical Rating on CAN SLIM Screen with Strong Earnings Momentum
summary: GE stock shows strong CAN SLIM potential with 24.83% quarterly EPS growth, 29% sales growth, and 47.79% ROE. With a 9/10 technical rating and 77.71 relative strength, GE emerges as a top growth stock in a favorable market environment.

headline: GE Aerospace (GE) Anticipates More China Deals Following Trump-Xi Summit
summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On Sunday, the company’s CEO, Larry Culp, described China’s plan to acquire 200 Boeing jets as a significant step towards reopening sales in the country. headline: GE Aerospace Wolfspeed Deal Reframes Long Term Power Electronics Story
summary: GE Aerospace and Wolfspeed announced a Memorandum of Understanding to collaborate on high-voltage silicon carbide power electronics for aerospace and defense. The agreement focuses on next generation power systems that support US priorities in advanced technology and supply chain resilience. The collaboration targets applications including industrial platforms and Artificial Intelligence enabled aerospace and defense systems. General Electric (NYSE:GE) is adding this Wolfspeed partnership...
